title: Welcome to the New Goderich Chess Club Blog
excerpt: We're kicking off a proper Posts & News section so members can catch up on results, reminders, and club happenings between Tuesday meetings.
content:
We're kicking off a proper Posts & News section so members can catch up on results, reminders, and club happenings between Tuesday meetings.

Going forward, look here for tournament recaps, holiday closures, new member shout-outs, and the occasional puzzle. As always, the club meets every Tuesday from 6-8pm at Goderich Library, and admission is free.

Have something you'd like posted? Email us at goderichchessclub@gmail.com.

title: Summer Meeting Hours Confirmed
excerpt: Tuesday meetings continue right through the summer at Goderich Library - same time, same place.
content:
Tuesday meetings continue right through the summer at Goderich Library - same time, same place.

6:00 - 8:00 PM every Tuesday, no registration required. Bring a friend, bring a board if you have a favourite set, and come test out some new openings. We'll post any holiday closures here and on the Events Calendar page ahead of time.
